title: Bounded Autonomy
summary: Automate low-risk actions, but gate risky or user-visible changes behind review thresholds.

title: Next Best Action
summary: Always expose one clear next action so users and agents know how to move the workflow forward.

title: Stage Visibility
summary: Show pipeline stages, counts, and current blockers so complex loops stay understandable.

title: Closed Loop Telemetry
summary: Every dispatched change should write back outcome signals so the system can learn from real results.

title: Progressive Disclosure
summary: Keep the default surface simple and reveal deeper control only when users need it.
